cards.name: Amenity Labourer Green
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for a labourer who is supervised by a competent skilled person.

cards.name: Amenity Trainee Red
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for a trainee who is registered to complete a relevant qualification, technical award/professional membership.

cards.name: Amenity Experienced Worker (Temporary) Red
cards.desc: This temporary card is available specifically for workers with on the job experience (at least one year in the last three) who are registered to complete a relevant NVQ/SVQ/Diploma at Level 2.

cards.name: Amenity Skilled Worker Blue
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for a skilled worker who has achieved a relevant NVQ/SVQ/Diploma at Level 2 appropriate to amenity or relevant training for an Artificial Grass Installer.

cards.name: Amenity Experienced Technical, Supervisor or Manager Red
cards.desc: This SmartCard is available specifically to Supervisors/Managers with on the job experience (at least one year in the last three) who are registered to complete a relevant NVQ/SVQ/Diploma.

cards.name: Amenity Supervisor Gold
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for a supervisor who has achieved a relevant NVQ/SVQ/Diploma at Level 3.

cards.name: Amenity Manager Black
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for a manager who has achieved a relevant NVQ/SVQ/Diploma at Level 4 or above.

cards.name: Amenity Academically Qualified Person (AQP) White/Yellow
cards.desc: This SmartCard is available for an applicant who has achieved a related Degree/HND/HNC.

cards.name: Amenity Provisional Red
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for an individual who is over 16 and is either on a probationary period or supervised work experience. This SmartCard is valid for six months and is not renewable.

cards.name: Arborist Labourer Green
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for labourers who are supervised by a competent skilled person.

cards.name: Arborist Skilled Worker Blue
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for skilled worker who has achieved a relevant chainsaw qualification.

cards.name: Arborist Trainee Red
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for a trainee who is registered to complete a relevant qualification or professional membership.

cards.name: Arborist Experienced Technical, Supervisor or Manager Red
cards.desc: This SmartCard is available specifically to Supervisors/Managers with on the job experience (at least one year in the last three) who are registered to complete a relevant Diploma/NVQ/SVQ.

cards.name: Arborist Supervisor Gold
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for a supervisor who has achieved a relevant NVQ/SVQ/Diploma at Level 3.

cards.name: Arborist Manager Black
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for a manager who has achieved a relevant NVQ/SVQ/Diploma at Level 4 or above.

cards.name: Arborist Academically Qualified Person (AQP) White/Yellow
cards.desc: This SmartCard is available for an applicant who has achieved a related Degree/HND/HNC.

cards.name: Arborist Professionally Qualified Person (PQP) White/Yellow
cards.desc: This SmartCard is available for an applicant who is a current Full/Fellow Member of the Arboricultural Association (AA) or current Chartered/Fellow Member of the Institute of Chartered Foresters (ICF).

cards.name: Arborist Provisional Red
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for an individual who is over 16 and is either on a probationary period or supervised work experience. This SmartCard is valid for six months and is not renewable.

cards.name: Countryside Management Experienced Worker (Temporary) Red
cards.desc: This temporary card is available specifically for workers with on the job experience (at least one year in the last three) who are registered to complete a relevant NVQ/SVQ/Diploma at Level 2.

cards.desc: This SmartCard is for a manager who has achieved a relevant NVQ/SVQ/Diploma at Level 4 or above.

cards.name: Countryside Management Academically Qualified Person (AQP) White/Yellow
cards.desc: This SmartCard is available for an applicant who has achieved a related Degree/HND/HNC.

cards.name: Ecology and Environmental Management Skilled Worker Blue
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for a skilled worker who is approved and licensed with the appropriate licensing authorities in England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland.

cards.name: Ecology and Environmental Management Trainee Red
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for a trainee who is registered to complete a relevant qualification/professional membership.

cards.name: Ecology and Environmental Management Academically Qualified Person (AQP) White/Yellow
cards.desc: This SmartCard is available for an applicant who has achieved a related Degree/HND/HNC.

cards.name: Ecology and Environmental Management Professionally Qualified Person (PQP) White/Yellow
cards.desc: This SmartCard is available for applicants who are Full Members of the Chartered Institute of Ecology and Environmental Management (CIEEM) or a Member Grade/Chartered/Fellow Membership of the Chartered Institution of Water and Environmental Management (CIWEM).

cards.name: Ecology and Environmental Management Provisional Red
cards.desc: This SmartCard is for an individual who is over 16 and is either on a probationary period or supervised work experience. This SmartCard is valid for six months and is not renewable.
